task: Refactor RetroCause frontend homepage by extracting pure TypeScript types and formatting/status helpers from frontend/src/app/page.tsx into frontend/src/lib without changing user-visible behavior; keep the first slice small and verify with frontend lint/build, npm test if needed, and guardrails.
